title: Proteomics and ovarian cancer: integrating proteomics information into clinical care.
author: Hays JL Kim G Giuroiu I Kohn EC
content: S-EPMC2939206 PMC2939206 Proteomics and ovarian cancer: integrating proteomics information into clinical care. The power of proteomics allows unparalleled opportunity to query the molecular mechanisms of a malignant cell and the tumor microenvironment in patients with ovarian cancer and other solid
